title: orania glauca
intro: Orania glauca, also known as the African stinkwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Orania glauca include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. In herbal preparations, Orania glauca is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and ointments that can be used to soothe various health issues.
